context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the tdd instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Orchestrates the full Elixir TDD cycle. Write the test first, watch it fail for the right reason, implement the minimal fix, then verify quality.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Write the minimal failing test** — see Example below.

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Run**: `mix test test/path/to/file_test.exs` — confirm it FAILS.

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **On approval**: Write the implementation.

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Run**: `mix test test/path/to/file_test.exs` — confirm the target test now PASSES.

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Run full quality suite** in order:

checklist.name: instruction-7
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **All four commands must be green.** If any fail:

checklist.name: instruction-8
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **HARD GATE — Quality Check**

checklist.name: instruction-9
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Produce the PR** with a description that references the failing test, the minimal implementation, and the quality suite result.
